_description: Wave 200c: shipped 2026-05-31 with bart-filing-cabinet-glare + bart-folder-refusal. Zero new spend.
title: Girth Quarterly, Volume 3 Issue 2

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
GIRTH QUARTERLY

A newsletter
from the 1990s
segments.narration: Girth Quarterly. A newsletter from the nineteen-nineties.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'Nineteen-nineties' as one phrase, no comedic stress.

segments.name: bart_drawer
segments.narration: The author was anonymous. Bart keeps a stapled copy in his desk drawer.
segments.instructions: Two sentences. Read 'in his desk drawer' as if it were 'in his filing cabinet' — exact same flat tone.

segments.name: bart_silence
segments.narration: He will neither confirm nor deny.
segments.instructions: Six words. The kind of line a press secretary uses. Documentary-narrator falling tone.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: Two short fragments. The Swingline number is the punchline — read it like a serial number, no nudge.
